testcase.name: verifyEmptyFieldsLogin

failure.message: Login should work with empty fields (Intentional Failure 2) expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: verifyEmptyPasswordLogin

testcase.name: verifyInvalidLogin

failure.message: Assumed dashboard should be displayed for invalid credentials (Intentional Failure 1) expected [true] but found [false]
